name: Cory Booker
subject: Early morning layovers and late night red-eyes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, We've known from the beginning that we'd be an underdog in this race. And in order to win, we'd need to run a grassroots campaign. That means we have to be smarter and more efficient with how and when we allocate our resources. We don't spend on what we want, we spend on what we need to win. **When you invest in this campaign, we use every single one of your hard-earned dollars to keep building a movement that you can be proud of.** That means investing in more field offices in the early states, hiring more field organizers to spread our message on the ground, and placing more ads to reach voters where they are. In other words, we prioritize our budget on spending money where it matters most. **[If you believe in running a grassroots, people-funded presidential campaign, consider chipping in whatever you can right now.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191022_CB_20191022-fr-CB-expenditures-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Sometimes the pathway to victory might mean an early morning layover on the way to Cedar Rapids or a late night red-eye from Reno, but it's always worth it if it helps us come closer to making our vision for America a reality. Our goal is to win -- to defeat Donald Trump and begin the hard work of healing our nation after years of hatred and bigotry. **We must never lose sight of this.** I'm going to keep doing everything I can to make you proud out there. **[I hope you'll join me.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191022_CB_20191022-fr-CB-expenditures-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Sincerely,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191022_CB_20191022-fr-CB-expenditures-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a02/5fca0d19/76aed38f/291c2b76/3635804856/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a02/5fca0d19/76aed38f/291c2b75/3635804856/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a02/5fca0d19/76aed38f/291c2b74/3635804856/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a02/5fca0d19/76aed38f/291c2b73/3635804856/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a02/5fca0d19/76aed38f/291c2b72/3635804856/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a02/5fca0d19/76aed38f/291c2b76/3635804856/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Vice President Pence: The American people deserve better
body:
SCHOTT’s success story symbolizes the manufacturing renaissance that’s happened under President Trump. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aa92e7da49&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 22, 2019
---
| | |
# **Vice President Pence: The American people deserve better **

**Yesterday,** Vice President Mike Pence traveled to Pennsylvania and got a firsthand look at SCHOTT North America’s original optical glass manufacturing plant in the United States. The facility first opened its doors 50 years ago.

[In photos: Vice President Pence speaks directly to Pennsylvania workers.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d0ce038aa4&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Since then, this facility,** I’m told, has expanded nearly five times over,” he said.

**SCHOTT’s success story** symbolizes the manufacturing renaissance that’s happened under President Donald J. Trump. In the less than 3 years since Election Day 2016, SCHOTT has invested $32 million in this one facility alone and expanded its workforce by 15 percent. Then, they watched their sales soar by a third.

**“Each one of you** are proving every single day that as long as the playing field is level, American workers can out-compete, out-innovate, and out-work anybody in the world,” the Vice President told employees.

**But that level playing field** is at risk, despite President Trump’s continued push to renegotiate America’s aging, failing trade deals. The reason is that when it comes to our most important trading relationship—that with Canada and Mexico, covered by the outdated NAFTA—House Democrats continue to shelve President Trump’s new deal.

**USMCA** , or the United States–Mexico–Canada Agreement, updates the quarter-century old NAFTA to the tune of a projected _$68 billion_ in new economic growth. That amounts to another 175,000 jobs, of which 50,000 will be on factory floors across America.

**“As****I stand here today** , the USMCA is languishing in the House of Representatives,” Vice President Pence said. “You see the headlines. These days, Democrats are spending all their time on endless investigations and a partisan impeachment. But the American people deserve better.”

**States****like****Pennsylvania** can’t afford this political waiting game. Today, the Keystone State exports more than $15 billion of its goods and services to Canada and Mexico. That number would dramatically increase if USMCA passes.

**Democrats wrongly assume** that obstructing and declining to update NAFTA will hurt President Trump politically. They’re wrong. But more important, putting partisan politics before the very labor and environmental improvements they once fought for is Washington at its swampiest.

**House Democrats** , Speaker Nancy Pelosi claims your 24/7 hearing circus won’t keep Congress from doing its job. Prove it. Pass USMCA, and put American workers first.

[Democrats, keep America growing with USMCA.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=91b67b9ba4&e=3ee4985eea)

**Photos:** [Vice President Pence tours Pennsylvania plant](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=83c009ab13&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the Day: Ivanka Trump at the World Bank**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e080fd4ff3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **“Investing in women** and engaging more women in the workforce is not only the right thing to do—it’s good business,” Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump told a group assembled at the World Bank in Washington, D.C., on Friday.

**She is helping lead** a $2.6 billion international fund, called the Women’s Entrepreneurs Finance Initiative (We-Fi), aimed at helping women in countries where they face discrimination in getting loans and starting businesses. The United States has contributed $50 million to the program to date.
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House photo by D. Myles Cullen
| **Vice President Mike Pence delivers remarks at SCHOTT North America** | October 21, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=355591b3fc&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c9e474fd45&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=413058ebb6)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Brad Elkins, People for Ben
subject: can't-miss BRL news for October
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
|
---
| | Hey folks, it's Brad, Ben Ray's campaign manager.

Since this campaign first began, we've prioritized giving our grassroots supporters a behind-the-scenes look at how we're building a campaign that can win and protect our Democratic majority in New Mexico.

**Here 's the can't-miss news for October:**

**_FINANCE UPDATE:_**

**WE 'RE SETTING FUNDRAISING RECORDS.** Last quarter, our campaign raised more than $1 million, a record amount for New Mexico Senate candidates in the third quarter of an off-year. 98% of contributions were $100 or less and _not a single dollar_ came from corporate PACs. _That 's what people power looks like!_

**BUT WE 'RE NOT RESTING ON OUR LAURELS.** Last quarter, GOP Senate candidates in New Mexico raised more than $350,000, including $100,000 in self-funding from a deep-pocketed candidate. On October 15, _The Hill_ also announced that the Trump campaign is hiring staff in New Mexico, including seasoned operatives that know how to win uphill battles.

**HERE 'S THE BOTTOM LINE.** Republicans want to make New Mexico a battleground state in 2020. We're counting on small-dollar grassroots donations to stop them. **You can help us keep New Mexico blue by pitching in here:[https://secure.numero.ai/contribute/peopleforben](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b464/18e32a7f/53b44c75/7b2349c4/1230059075/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.numero.ai/contribute/peopleforben?refcode=dd_20191022_em_update_natl&amount=25")**

** _FIELD UPDATE_**

**SIGNATURE COLLECTION IS IN FULL SWING.** In New Mexico, Democratic candidates for Senate must collect thousands of signatures from voters to appear on the ballot. Starting next weekend and running through November, our campaign will be operating a signature-collecting contest with prizes available for top volunteers. _**[Sign up to volunteer!](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b464/18e32a7f/53b44c75/7b2349c5/1230059075/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/get-ben-ray-on-the-ballot?source=dd_20191022_em_update_natl")**_

**OUR PARADE GAME IS ON POINT.** On October 5, the Lujan campaign joined supporters in Shiprock for the annual Northern Navajo Nation Fair Parade. _**[Did you know Ben Ray can juggle?](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b464/18e32a7f/53b44c75/7b2349fa/1230059075/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=476950206231530")**_

**HEY HEY SANTA FE!** Earlier this month, we opened our first campaign office in Santa Fe with a rousing **[speech](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b464/18e32a7f/53b44c75/7b2349fb/1230059075/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=2528613423872932")** from Ben Ray about the importance of protecting our democracy. Stop by 1630 St. Michaels Drive in Santa Fe to learn more about getting involved with our campaign.

**_ENDORSEMENT UPDATE_**

Our campaign has been honored to receive endorsements from leaders across New Mexico and the country, including:
* U.S. Senator Kirsten Gillibrand _**[(Video)](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b464/18e32a7f/53b44c75/7b2349f8/1230059075/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=503615680474524")**_
* Council for a Livable World _**[(Tweet)](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b464/18e32a7f/53b44c75/7b2349f9/1230059075/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/Livableworld/status/1184140709701603329")**_
* American Federation of State, County and Municipal Employees _**[(Release)](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b464/18e32a7f/53b44c75/7b2349fe/1230059075/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.ladailypost.com/content/afscme-endorses-luj%C3%A1n-us-senate")**_
* Thousands of our neighbors from across New Mexico

**_POLITICAL UPDATE_**

**TOWN HALL IN TAOS.** On November 8, Ben Ray will be in Taos for the first Senate town hall of the 2020 election. _[**Reserve your ticket.**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b464/18e32a7f/53b44c75/7b2349ff/1230059075/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.taosvotesblue.com/events-1/u-s-senate-candidates-in-taos?fbclid=IwAR2ssJF5Pq0Q1hzs1CRHDF4A9IZRTbyv7Pus4BJPT4KPQe40TpugSEIpb4s")_

**GET YOUR "I VOTED STICKER!** Early voting for the 2019 local elections began on October 8 and will continue through November 2. Critical bond issues and local elections will be on the ballot, so it's important to make your voice heard at the polls. **_[Find your polling place.](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b464/18e32a7f/53b44c75/7b2349fc/1230059075/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://voterportal.servis.sos.state.nm.us/WhereToVoteAddress.aspx")_**

**_FUN STUFF_**

**JOIN US ON FACEBOOK.** The People for Ben Facebook Group is a community gathering place for grassroots supporters of our campaign to get a behind-the-scenes look at life on the trail. _**[Become a member of People for Ben.](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b464/18e32a7f/53b44c75/7b2349fd/1230059075/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/groups/210720152829696/")**_

**HELP OUR NEW VIDEO GO VIRAL.** Last month, President Trump came to New Mexico for a divisive rally in which he promised to turn New Mexico red. Ben Ray joined other Democrats for a unity rally to show that New Mexico will never flip, and filmed a video about the values that our campaign stands for. **_[Watch.](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b464/18e32a7f/53b44c75/7b2349f2/1230059075/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=420995768548636")_** | | ******[**Share our video on Twitter!**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b464/18e32a7f/53b44c75/7b2349f3/1230059075/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=.%40benraylujan%20led%20the%20Democratic%20effort%20to%20win%20back%20the%20House%20of%20Representatives%20in%202018.%20Now%20he%27s%20running%20for%20Senate%20to%20stand%20up%20to%20Donald%20Trump%20and%20Mitch%20McConnell%20and%20win%20our%20government%20back%20for%20the%20American%20people.%20Take%20a%20look%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fwatch%2F%3Fv%3D420995768548636%20%23PeopleforBen")******
---

******[**Share our video on Facebook!**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b464/18e32a7f/53b44c75/7b2349f0/1230059075/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FBenRayLujan%2Fvideos%2F420995768548636%2F")******
---
**CHECK OUT THESE PICS FROM THE TRAIL.** From #BabiesforBenRay to Frito Pie, our campaign is building a community of grassroots supporters across New Mexico. **Take a look:**

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b464/18e32a7f/53b44c75/7b2349f1/1230059075/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b464/18e32a7f/53b44c75/7b2349f6/1230059075/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b464/18e32a7f/53b44c75/7b2349f7/1230059075/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b464/18e32a7f/53b44c75/7b2349f4/1230059075/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.numero.ai/contribute/peopleforben?refcode=footer&amount=25&recurring=auto")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b464/18e32a7f/53b44c75/7b2349f5/1230059075/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b464/18e32a7f/53b44c75/7b2349ea/1230059075/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

| | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.
---

Ben Ray joined other Democrats for a unity rally to show that New Mexico will never flip, and filmed a video about the values that our campaign stands for. "" | | **** ""** ** ""** CHECK OUT THESE PICS FROM THE TRAIL. From #BabiesforBenRay to Frito Pie, our campaign is building a community of grassroots supporters across New Mexico. Take a look: | "" "" "" Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? ""** We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, "" If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request. People for Ben PO Box 25371 Albuquerque, NM 87125 | | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

subject: Silence is Complicity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11126508/112947927/1785235803?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzQzODAwNi05NWY1LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SBuqRG-M-dc-rpTb1PObpCTOkfwPZtjokr9fnPxSlu4=&refcode=header)
Peter,
In the last three months, we’ve seen tragedies in Gilroy, El Paso, Dayton, Odessa, and Midland - mass shootings are destroying communities, and the American people are sick of it. **Congress’ failure to protect innocent lives is a great disservice to the American people.**
**90% of Americans already support gun safety bills like universal background checks.** So why does Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell refuse to take action on gun legislation?
**With 291 mass shootings in 2019 so far,** Americans are living in fear every day over whether they will become the next mass shooting statistic - **this is outrageous!**
As your Congresswoman, I will fight tooth and nail to put our communities and our children above the NRA and partisan politics. Texas deserves hardworking leaders who care about every life.
**We have to keep the pressure on in Washington -** Congress must set aside partisan politics and work together to take decisive action that can save lives. Demand that Congress do their job.
_[**Peter, will you sign this petition to urge Congress to pass gun safety laws already passed in the House?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11126509/112947933/-1679108060?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzQzODAwNi05NWY1LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SBuqRG-M-dc-rpTb1PObpCTOkfwPZtjokr9fnPxSlu4=&emci=34f83f07-eff4-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=4c438006-95f5-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)_
Thank you for all that you do,
Elisa Cardnell

body:
| | |
---
| Hey there, We've selected you as someone who is likely to know Cory and our campaign the best. You're a valued member of our team, and as we continue to spread our message to communities like Cresco, Cory would like to hear from you. **Can you take our survey right now so we can hear your feedback? Here 's a link: [https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/priorities-survey](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/priorities-survey?source=em_su_20191023_BHQ_20191023_su_BHQ_priorities_actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")** This information is extremely important for our leadership team. Will you let us know how we've been doing? We've been busy planning our strategy leading into February when voting begins, and we could use your help. **[Will you be one of the folks from Pennsylvania who takes our survey? Your response is invaluable to our campaign.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/priorities-survey?source=em_su_20191023_BHQ_20191023_su_BHQ_priorities_actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")** Booker HQ [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/priorities-survey?source=em_su_20191023_BHQ_20191023_su_BHQ_priorities_actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

This campaign is moving quickly. name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: Mitch McConnell is refusing, but we’re not done fighting!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wNg1G0WLvHxrnvLQdy9zErmEL5zdRDBahBmXv2cRg5Q=/lls3PE_EE-f6L9x0meQ8lwCmGlPEIIGHcH5JnW_FIg4=?refcode=20191023_hr1JA)
---
**[SIGN ON NOW: Demand the Senate pass the'For the People' Act ⇒](https://act.myngp.com/el/wNg1G0WLvHxrnvLQdy9zErmEL5zdRDBahBmXv2cRg5Q=/OGPC3cwqGBQ-u9M0z8E2uXml6-dXKn61QN8mK0rg_8M=)** Team, Earlier this year, the U.S. House of Representatives passed H.R. 1, a comprehensive package of election, campaign finance, and transparency reforms to fix our broken political system in Washington, D.C. This legislation would be the most serious government reform in nearly a generation. And it's one that we absolutely need. Elections are the building blocks of democracy, and keeping their integrity is key to a strong nation. Unfortunately, Senate Republicans in Washington are pretty happy with the status quo that allows a few of their mega-donors to drown out the voices of millions of ordinary Americans -- **so Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell is refusing to bring H.R. 1 up for a vote.** [**Will you add your name to demand McConnell give these critical reforms an up-or-down vote in the Senate?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wNg1G0WLvHxrnvLQdy9zErmEL5zdRDBahBmXv2cRg5Q=/OGPC3cwqGBQ-u9M0z8E2uXml6-dXKn61QN8mK0rg_8M=) | ******[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/wNg1G0WLvHxrnvLQdy9zErmEL5zdRDBahBmXv2cRg5Q=/OGPC3cwqGBQ-u9M0z8E2uXml6-dXKn61QN8mK0rg_8M=)******
---

**Like many Americans, I believe that dark money and corporate interests don 't have a place in our politics. (That's why I'm running a grassroots campaign [totally funded by supporters like YOU.](https://act.myngp.com/el/wNg1G0WLvHxrnvLQdy9zErmEL5zdRDBahBmXv2cRg5Q=/ZurTqgH2iR4wIB51bnfu2BBaZpV4OvEbmT1UOQfPaZI=?refcode=20191023_hr1JA) I'm not a millionaire funding my own campaign and I'm not taking a dime from corporate PACs. ****So****, every bit of success we have is thanks to YOU, and that 's how it should be!)**
It's time to restore Americans' trust in their representatives by making sure lawmakers represent their constituents. [**We can 't let Mitch succeed in disillusioning American voters. Sign on now to keep the pressure on and make sure these critical reforms get p**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wNg1G0WLvHxrnvLQdy9zErmEL5zdRDBahBmXv2cRg5Q=/OGPC3cwqGBQ-u9M0z8E2uXml6-dXKn61QN8mK0rg_8M=)[**assed!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wNg1G0WLvHxrnvLQdy9zErmEL5zdRDBahBmXv2cRg5Q=/OGPC3cwqGBQ-u9M0z8E2uXml6-dXKn61QN8mK0rg_8M=)

******[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/wNg1G0WLvHxrnvLQdy9zErmEL5zdRDBahBmXv2cRg5Q=/OGPC3cwqGBQ-u9M0z8E2uXml6-dXKn61QN8mK0rg_8M=)******
---

Thanks for standing up,
Sri Preston Kulkarni

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Let’s shock everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We want to SHOCK the establishment, the media, and everyone watching.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=2099%2E377263%2EfRrouU) Yang Gang,

There are still a lot of people out there who haven’t heard our vision for the future of this country, and we are running out of time to reach them.

**We want to SHOCK the establishment, the media, and everyone watching by launching a big ad buy on TV and online. This is how we reach these voters and show everyone what this movement is all about.**

[To shoot, produce, edit, and then air ads in early primary states online and on TV, we need to raise $1.5 million by the end of October. Will you help us reach this goal and pitch in $5 or more?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14884?t=5&akid=2099%2E377263%2EfRrouU) | [Pitch in](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14884?t=13&akid=2099%2E377263%2EfRrouU)
---
This is a crucial time in Iowa and New Hampshire.

Voters are tuning in and looking to see which candidates are serious, who they should be learning more about, and who they want as their next president.

We want to be front and center in their minds. And this ad buy is how we do that.

Can we count on you, Yang Gang, to step up now when it matters most? **Pitch in now. Every dollar you can give will make a BIG difference:**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14884?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=2099%2E377263%2EfRrouU)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14884?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=2099%2E377263%2EfRrouU)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14884?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2099%2E377263%2EfRrouU)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14884?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2099%2E377263%2EfRrouU)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14884?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=2099%2E377263%2EfRrouU)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14884?t=7&amount=25&akid=2099%2E377263%2EfRrouU)
---
When I first entered this race, they called me a longer-than-long shot to win the nomination. Now, we’ve outraised and outpolled members of Congress, mayors, and governors.

Let’s show them what we’re made of one more time.

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/14884?t=6&akid=2099%2E377263%2EfRrouU)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=2099%2E377263%2EfRrouU) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2099%2E377263%2EfRrouU) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

New York, NY

name: Andrew Childs
subject: a million doors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
We built this campaign knowing the outcome of this race could be determined by just a few hundred votes. That's why our field team has already knocked on more than 700,000 doors across Kentucky.
|
---

| | Peter, we built this campaign knowing the outcome of this race could be determined by just a few hundred votes. That's why our field team has _already_ knocked on more than 700,000 doors across Kentucky.

We've set a huge goal of knocking on a **million doors** by Election Day. This is what grassroots enthusiasm looks like.

We're having face-to-face conversations about why this election is so important. It's the best way to combat the lies and smears coming from Matt Bevin.

But it also takes resources. We have 18 field offices from Ashland to Murray. That means paying for rent and utilities, printing canvassing lists, and buying water for our volunteers. **We need $15,000 to fully fund our ground game. Pitch in now.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [DONATE $5](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579b5/ad6dc73/145070eb/db71bc4/691769412/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4NiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-octfieldfund?express_lane=true&refcode=20191023.1nd__386__&amount=5") [DONATE $10](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579b5/ad6dc73/145070eb/db71bc5/691769412/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4NiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-octfieldfund?express_lane=true&refcode=20191023.1nd__386__&amount=10") [DONATE $25](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579b5/ad6dc73/145070eb/db71bda/691769412/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4NiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-octfieldfund?express_lane=true&refcode=20191023.1nd__386__&amount=25") [DONATE $50](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579b5/ad6dc73/145070eb/db71bdb/691769412/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4NiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-octfieldfund?express_lane=true&refcode=20191023.1nd__386__&amount=50") [DONATE $100](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579b5/ad6dc73/145070eb/db71bd8/691769412/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4NiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-octfieldfund?express_lane=true&refcode=20191023.1nd__386__&amount=100") [CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579b5/ad6dc73/145070eb/db71bd9/691769412/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4NiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-octfieldfund?refcode=20191023.1nd__386__") Thanks,
Andrew Childs, Field Director | | ****[DONATE](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579b5/ad6dc73/145070eb/db71bde/691769412/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4NiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-octfieldfund?refcode=20191023.1nd__386__&amount=5")****

name: Team Beto
subject: Game changing news from NBC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

We wanted
to make sure you saw this:

“Only 9% of all Democratic respondents say their minds are definitely made
up.”

-NBC News

This is game changing news. It means that this race is absolutely wide
open. We need to act quickly to capitalize because we know that every one
of our competitors is looking at this exact same poll. And they’ll be
rushing massive resources out the door to introduce their candidate to
these undecided voters.

**"[Sestak] ****thrives on talking to average Americans**. [**And he has made a career – a life, even – of challenging seemingly insurmountable odds.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11142059/113083795/2142984568?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjVhOTNjYy1jOWY1LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5oupLRQJ7_lY-E8jk57tIOP_c1flOTXizZ-wmekNGdw=&refcode=em102319csm) His teenage daughter beat brain cancer – twice. He was **elected as a Democrat in a 2:1 Republican district** , and won again two years later by a landslide. **He challenged the Democratic establishment** and President Barack Obama after the party endorsed former Pennsylvania Sen. body:
**Families shouldn 't have to choose between lifesaving medication and putting food on the table.**

[ADD YOUR NAME: Tell Congress to pass legislation lowering the cost of prescription drugs!](https://act.myngp.com/el/WI5UT7ZecJITfWr56uTPS8aaOIuJMAzI8LARKtso5d0=/TRO2z6GVCwKRbAaub4tLVRmW5uyc9WnvMlpPU9w8Sys=)

* * *

Peter, it's simple: Americans shouldn't have to choose between paying for basic necessities and medications they rely on - especially while Big Pharma profits hand over fist.

That's why I've joined with my colleagues on the House Ways and Means Committee to move forward with a bill to lower prescription drug prices.

[It's time for a solution. Add your name and tell Congress to pass legislation lowering the costs of prescription drugs!](https://act.myngp.com/el/WI5UT7ZecJITfWr56uTPS8aaOIuJMAzI8LARKtso5d0=/TRO2z6GVCwKRbAaub4tLVRmW5uyc9WnvMlpPU9w8Sys=)

**[SIGN ON](https://act.myngp.com/el/WI5UT7ZecJITfWr56uTPS8aaOIuJMAzI8LARKtso5d0=/TRO2z6GVCwKRbAaub4tLVRmW5uyc9WnvMlpPU9w8Sys=)**
I'm committed to stopping the skyrocketing prices of prescription drugs, but I need you with me.

[Sign on right away: join us in the fight to lower the costs of prescription drugs and ensure affordable and accessible health care for everyone. ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/WI5UT7ZecJITfWr56uTPS8aaOIuJMAzI8LARKtso5d0=/TRO2z6GVCwKRbAaub4tLVRmW5uyc9WnvMlpPU9w8Sys=)

Thanks,
Mike

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/WI5UT7ZecJITfWr56uTPS8aaOIuJMAzI8LARKtso5d0=/kMMZpqLcj68pXZ6idf3Qavw_9o_SazwE9iE_WKc6mgU=)
* * *

[**For the last decade, Michael has led the charge on banning members of Congress from ever becoming lobbyists to close the revolving door in Washington.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae9c/134673f2/a1344ae/6997facb/2055819775/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/pet-end-lobbying?source=EM_PET_B1_102319_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")

You don't go to Washington to get rich -- you go to serve the American people.

But corporate special interest groups have flooded Congress with dark money, allowing them to leave office and make millions.

[**That 's why Michael is running for president:** He's got plans to clean up corruption in government - but he needs people like you to sign on in support of the plan.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae9c/134673f2/a1344ae/6997facb/2055819775/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/pet-end-lobbying?source=EM_PET_B1_102319_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Demand Transparency in the Impeachment Process
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
My Republican colleagues and I held a press conference today, and we asked one simple question: What is Adam Schiff hiding?
Democrats have been holding secret hearings behind closed doors, removing members of Congress like myself from those hearings, and selectively leaking information that makes the President look bad. It is an absolute sham, and I hope you'll stand with me as I fight for transparency.
---
| | | [DEMAND TRANSPARENCY - DONATE NOW](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aQBYdjrZdD48KF69E5W30G0UOrj_bQvRObFHxquEOuHzTEZtTXqk19EoVjLT2ds8YZyimgzBNvhBAOa1Ip7GQmbWwrwtx2--lftrCkqDzYlFcrdVRjraFwI9jZ2GK_jAoNB2G39m85LjOAHWWcdP42LtikU_tHiKzehWhvVmvPmZV6mllhIgXm_819qTJJH9com7v_4XpE69lNU2YG0pLA==&c=2vyweAjr_3ZWB-f3eeMk7pWND5ohvij_F6TsURlvn1C1Ofhw5moCUw==&ch=OxSCtqMlNBT0HLqxM_nflYI4VNvsWJQS_n1d6AzYIJq9dHV3a1dgGA==)
---
| Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi are afraid of the truth, and they're trying to overthrow an election in which the American electorate chose Donald Trump as our President. If we don't get transparency in this impeachment process, the Democrats will eventually get their way and remove President Trump from office. They've been trying to impeach him since he was elected, and they won't stop until he is.
I'm fighting to expose their dirty tactics and backroom deals so we can have a fair and transparent process. Then the American people can see for themselves the Democrats' true intentions- to overturn the 2016 election and ensure that Donald Trump won't win reelection in 2020. I refuse to back down from this fight, but I'm going to need your support through thick and thin. [Will you stand with me?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aQBYdjrZdD48KF69E5W30G0UOrj_bQvRObFHxquEOuHzTEZtTXqk19EoVjLT2ds8YZyimgzBNvhBAOa1Ip7GQmbWwrwtx2--lftrCkqDzYlFcrdVRjraFwI9jZ2GK_jAoNB2G39m85LjOAHWWcdP42LtikU_tHiKzehWhvVmvPmZV6mllhIgXm_819qTJJH9com7v_4XpE69lNU2YG0pLA==&c=2vyweAjr_3ZWB-f3eeMk7pWND5ohvij_F6TsURlvn1C1Ofhw5moCUw==&ch=OxSCtqMlNBT0HLqxM_nflYI4VNvsWJQS_n1d6AzYIJq9dHV3a1dgGA==)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Retired officer: Trump’s Withdrawal from Syria Saves American Lives from Unwinnable Middle East Conflict
body:
"President Trump cares about America’s men and women in uniform in a way that his detractors can never fully understand, because he alone..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=620d9428cb&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Retired officer: Trump’s Withdrawal from Syria Saves American Lives from Unwinnable Middle East Conflict**

“President Trump cares about America’s men and women in uniform in a way that his detractors can never fully understand, because he alone bears responsibility when the political class’s visions of glory give way to the grim realities of war,” Lt. Col. Tony Shaffer, retired senior intelligence operations officer, writes in the _Sun Sentinel_.

“The president promised that he would not get America mired in endless, unwinnable foreign wars . . . When presented with an opportunity to disentangle our armed forces from yet another protracted Middle East conflict, the president wisely moved American troops out of harm’s way.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e62e592985&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Americans pay too much for prescription drugs under the current system. It is not fair. That’s why Republicans have pushed for legislation to increase competition, transparency, and accountability so people pay less at the counter for their prescriptions,” write Reps. Kevin Brady (R-TX), Virginia Foxx (R-NC), and Greg Walden (R-OR) in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1264d57868&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump’s daughter and adviser Ivanka Trump met with Reddit Inc. co-founder Alexis Ohanian at the White House Tuesday as part of the push by the tech entrepreneur—and husband to tennis star Serena Williams—to promote paid family leave,” Justin Sink reports for _[**Bloomberg**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=35a4ab518d&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| “Through a rarely used stipulation of the Congressional Review Act, Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer will force a vote for tax cuts on the wealthy. Specifically, he will be trying to repeal the relatively new cap on the state and local tax (SALT) deduction, so that uber-wealthy taxpayers living in high-tax jurisdictions can get a special tax break once again,” Tiana Lowe writes in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c14b334e56&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| “Under President Trump’s leadership, the DEA’s National Take Back Day events have shattered records, collecting 4.6 million pounds of unused or unwanted prescription drugs,” American Farm Bureau Federation President Zippy Duvall and White House Director of National Drug Control Policy Jim Carroll write in [Agri-Pulse. ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c0fe61435c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=62aa7c370f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d39ac7e00d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=2af3aaa13d)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Lerah
subject: What the heck, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lerah Lee for Congress
body:
I'm not one to use colorful language, but right now I'm really pissed off. My opponents are finding creative ways to fund their campaign: it's fishyI'm not one to use colorful language, but right now I'm really pissed off. My opponents are finding creative ways to fund their campaign: it's fishy. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_s=fd74af18f32c47e69c58dfe817d60e42&_t=ovqCmPiX5zmBvOQlBbap5_vt52_DV04tkQHmjiQNHAKAadsxvb0-ilcyGf-if7Ts69Xa7oWgITEvQJ7YEK-fYMewYC1GRD2AdLBXihBHjmcrEvfwuFihpTLQcJ0ll72owAl8fSInFh8YHwU3ltiT6hhg3i-BqDQmW_gwbFOqN1g%3D) | | [**PINK SLIP NOTICE**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=fd74af18f32c47e69c58dfe817d60e42&_e=Nu15e9ZY-pbMwOdzds239SHPcF3V7uLQsB5CmI-oAt720PHe7PUvVSCjy3KUSHAn7nDME0kRB1q1xBgNZHzBun3hySVKfyO8l9sL_1LwqTW5vTtW3M6G4dJomY00UAiXPnm9WUMt-PNK09SE2-G26rVgy1r8DyvYTzp1jqivYKLM1Q9qysdVJdW80fh4t5mcMqrO9cWeh668GrBhnHSrr9PkdYxDiWzdBqMIbYCf098z8hga4fR1G7ETqKaXB0Pc5q_oQw8gs5MFKPUEiJ7CgdYoMS-sQlSZidFhfF3TeU9An-LZWaQ1KP7aSwR5cJsr)
---
**Who** : Professional Politicians
**Why:** Failure to drain the Swamp. Failure to put AMERICA FIRST

* * *
**I need to raise $15,000 in the next 48 hours**. Will you make a contribution today and help me put failed career politicians on notice?
[** DONATE $35 » **](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=fd74af18f32c47e69c58dfe817d60e42&_e=Nu15e9ZY-pbMwOdzds239SHPcF3V7uLQsB5CmI-oAt720PHe7PUvVSCjy3KUSHAn7nDME0kRB1q1xBgNZHzBun3hySVKfyO8l9sL_1LwqTXrJ9IBtuoHGC2OrTHigSuURQw6Qgwjf66vfJlPSKaDrho1EDfe7l9yCIpI9Dv5pVJ7WipykElb4PwLFMWshjb1jeaQAl7D_Jj9YWkuIH7GZqBTTFtWE-djs43BhBFRv4XsYsX_P4PN_8ZnImYh1yP3mfKNTq65oGkXpgkICzEC5iBXiQdodZiHkq6-s_CtQQAshXkqVOPRWpSeNOBTOzDo)

Friend,

Chances are by now you've received a note from me, but in case you need a reminder:
* I'm running to be the**2nd-ever Black female Republican to serve in Congress**
* I have a Ph.D in education; my life's work has focused on ensuring every child has access to a good education.
* I'm a mother of five wonderful children. I'm a christian conservative

I'm not one to use colorful language, but right now – **_I'm really pissed off_**.

**Let me tell you why**.

On one hand I'm ecstatic at the level of support I've received, yet, I feel let down by our country's political system.**Why?** Because one of the Republican's I'm facing off against in the primary – **the epitome of a professional politician, having served in state government for over 20 years on a salary of less than $20,000 per year** – raised next to nothing but was able to loan her campaign more than $600,000!!

[**Give Career Politicians the Pink Slip**
**JOIN MY TEAM** »](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=fd74af18f32c47e69c58dfe817d60e42&_e=Nu15e9ZY-pbMwOdzds239SHPcF3V7uLQsB5CmI-oAt720PHe7PUvVSCjy3KUSHAn7nDME0kRB1q1xBgNZHzBun3hySVKfyO8l9sL_1LwqTVSIwYRDXAusIbX3sSSgEV910UQpqTZtgulWyG_9q_JwPmYVvhHwaWfOMwdVLnN04T1MKiPimyHDK4suXnUihvqy9d2EtTDbW6lzPhCNhYEZoB1vaGbWHUVeAaW78iFd8fICT7aXEeoxyLjAlSfiC0_hr2n2YcsXwiIQIMdFpbu1fqjuSCyqmw0uBa9IinxVuN3LJ3dxjWuHfK8CWTTBxZO)
---

I've been working my tail off trying to build grassroots support for my congressional campaign in Georgia's 7th District – **which next year will be home to one of the most expensive general election campaigns in the entire country**.

And during the most recent quarter, my "**ditch the career politicians** " message seemed to have resonnated across the district and the country, with**more than 7,000 conservatives making a contribution to my campaign**.

My team and I **worked tirelessly for the money we raised** – but the folks I'm running against don't think they have to play by the same rules for the same outcome. And in order to keep my America First campaign alive **[I still need to raise $15,000 in the next 48 hours.](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=fd74af18f32c47e69c58dfe817d60e42&_e=Nu15e9ZY-pbMwOdzds239SHPcF3V7uLQsB5CmI-oAt720PHe7PUvVSCjy3KUSHAn7nDME0kRB1q1xBgNZHzBun3hySVKfyO8l9sL_1LwqTVENxs2aFrxWIRbXQZJ4cj0HXUOKYrMPVpHd22y17yVnAlFI-VSjEwlERYgoBXRVrUCmzpoNXcT6rQcrJd1WUBfEdnep49ov2BKuc8eL_Oxr2F2XPKk8-Bud81zbIbtP85tA2b6gss_7eIuagtCGnq-iGmOurgaKuk2qmKVHECwC1HkXekLptqeoMNPbtzaSpGI9BwV7sGKUSQMV1Tb-iWo)**

So, **will you stand with me to help root out corruption in politics** while making a contribution today to help me close the gap between me and my career politician opponents?

clean_body: I'm not one to use colorful language, but right now I'm really pissed off. My opponents are finding creative ways to fund their campaign: it's fishyI'm not one to use colorful language, but right now I'm really pissed off. My opponents are finding creative ways to fund their campaign: it's fishy. Don't want to receive our emails? | | Who : Professional Politicians Why: Failure to drain the Swamp. Failure to put AMERICA FIRST I need to raise $15,000 in the next 48 hours. Will you make a contribution today and help me put failed career politicians on notice? Friend, Chances are by now you've received a note from me, but in case you need a reminder: I'm running to be the2nd-ever Black female Republican to serve in Congress I have a Ph.D in education; my life's work has focused on ensuring every child has access to a good education. I'm a mother of five wonderful children. I'm a christian conservative I'm not one to use colorful language, but right now – I'm really pissed off. Let me tell you why. On one hand I'm ecstatic at the level of support I've received, yet, I feel let down by our country's political system.Why? Because one of the Republican's I'm facing off against in the primary – the epitome of a professional politician, having served in state government for over 20 years on a salary of less than $20,000 per year – raised next to nothing but was able to loan her campaign more than $600,000!! I've been working my tail off trying to build grassroots support for my congressional campaign in Georgia's 7th District – which next year will be home to one of the most expensive general election campaigns in the entire country. And during the most recent quarter, my "ditch the career politicians " message seemed to have resonnated across the district and the country, withmore than 7,000 conservatives making a contribution to my campaign. My team and I worked tirelessly for the money we raised – but the folks I'm running against don't think they have to play by the same rules for the same outcome. And in order to keep my America First campaign alive So, will you stand with me to help root out corruption in politics while making a contribution today to help me close the gap between me and my career politician opponents? And if you're able to make a financial contribution to help me close the gap and break through the noise, I would be very appreciative. Blessings always, Dr. Lerah Lee | Paid for by Lerah Lee for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20LaTurner?=
subject: ☀ Team LaTurner on the move!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
We've been busy traveling the district and meeting with Kansans. Follow our travels! | | | |
---
| | | We've been busy traveling the district and meeting with Kansans because this is a grassroots campaign about you, not the coastal elites.
[Would you consider pitching in to help put gas in the tank so that we can continue to keep up the pace?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9e3fe1ebca&e=1050d051da)
---
| | **Pittsburg State Homecoming Parade**
---
|
---
|
---
| | Homecoming in Pittsburg, Kansas is extra special to the LaTurner crew because Jake is a graduate of Pitt State. [Thanks to everyone who joined us for the parade.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=23bb2946ea&e=1050d051da) Go Gorillas!
---
| | **Baldwin City Maple Leaf Parade**
---
|
---
|
---
| Thanks to the help of our great volunteers, [Team LaTurner was also able to be a part of the Maple Leaf Parade in Baldwin City on the same day as the Pitt State parade](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=eb5caf51ba&e=1050d051da). Couldn't have asked for a more beautiful day for two parades in Kansas!
---
|
---
| |
---
**Baldwin City visit** In a separate visit to Baldwin, [Jake met with residents of Baldwin City](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=87de2de0b9&e=1050d051da) at Daylight Espresso Coffee. He enjoyed a great discussion about how important it is that Kansans send someone to Washington who will fight for our conservative values, and talked with them about his [Contract with Kansas](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=1484fd5461&e=1050d051da).
---
|
---
|
---
**Washburn Rural High School Young Republicans** Jake met an impressive group of young Republicans in Topeka at the [Washburn Rural High School Young Republicans meeting this month.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=ab249604f5&e=1050d051da) The group is very engaged and anxious to be involved and informed. What a great training ground for preparing young conservatives to be an active part of the Republican Party in Kansas.
|
---
| **Shawnee County GOP Eisenhower Dinner**
---
|
---
---
| | [Jake attended the Eisenhower dinner](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=5b4627b0ab&e=1050d051da), an event hosted by the [Shawnee County Republicans](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=0f238ddec0&e=1050d051da) honoring former President Dwight D. Eisenhower. It was a great opportunity to remember Ike as an American hero and exceptional leader of our nation. Kansans must carry on his legacy by working together to protect our conservative values.
---
|
---
| **In case you missed it...**
---
|
---
Jake was honored to [receive the endorsement of three of the candidates](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=d10ba65ffb&e=1050d051da) who ran for the 2nd congressional district seat last year. All three of these great public servants offered words of confidence about Jake's ability to stand up and lead. [Read their full statements here.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=5562086a12&e=1050d051da)
|
---
| [Contribute to Send a Conservative to Congress](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=b616e14200&e=1050d051da "Contribute to Send a Conservative to Congress")

**Putting People First.**

_That’s what I’m most proud of during my time serving you as Indiana’s governor._

Whether it’s job creation, infrastructure improvement, education funding for our kids, fighting the drug crisis or helping Hoosiers lift themselves up, for me it always comes back to Putting People First.

I’m so proud to be Indiana’s governor, but even more proud to be a Hoosier. Are you proud to be a Hoosier? Tell me in your own words – take our official survey below!

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: Nobody talked about it (!)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,

Last week, 12 Democratic candidates for president took the stage to discuss the most pressing issues plaguing our country. Somehow, there was not a single question regarding the climate crisis.

This is unacceptable, and we must demand that our leaders take climate change seriously. It’s an issue that’s already affecting Illinoisans on a daily basis.

Climate change is one of the biggest issues we’re facing, and we must take action to address it. If you agree, add your name to our petition now. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OtSjiBGwLkyM1Hia1HOzMQ2]

Sign on today [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OtSjiBGwLkyM1Hia1HOzMQ2]

In Congress, I’m facing climate change head-on. Last year, I joined the Climate Solutions Caucus, and I have a 90% lifetime score from the League of Conservation Voters. I’ve been fighting to promote energy efficiency, reduce greenhouse gas emissions, and ensure that all Americans have safe drinking water.

We don’t have time to waste on our climate; we must rise and find solutions NOW. Sign our petition if you’re with me:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/OtSjiBGwLkyM1Hia1HOzMQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OtSjiBGwLkyM1Hia1HOzMQ2]

Thank you,
Dan

Dan, an engineer and former teacher, has brought hundreds of millions of dollars in critical infrastructure projects to Illinois, fought for better schools, protections for our seniors, reforms to fix our broken Congress, and sought to make healthcare more affordable for all. We are grateful for your support. Please take a moment to like Dan on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/danlipinskiforcongress/] or follow Dan on Twitter [https://twitter.com/DanLipinski] . If you’d like to contribute to help Dan keep fighting in Congress, you can click here to support Dan’s reelection now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-general?refcode=footer&amount=20&recurring=auto]

PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS

Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list. [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0cbf2dfd-d0f5-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68/a5f366d3-d1f5-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWYzNjZkMy1kMWY1LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=utiw1Ajagw964qwjnI7-eup1CvXwbbmM8iLMkgh1qL4=&id=103593688&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com]

subject: Have you seen what's happening in Kentucky, friend?

body:
I'm so excited that Amy McGrath is running to defeat Mitch and take back the Senate. She needs your support to do that.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-mcgrath-email?refcode=em191023mcgrath-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

There's so much at stake in 2020, and it's not just the Presidency. It's imperative that we take back the Senate so that Congress starts working for the American people again.

One key seat we need to take? Kentucky. Mitch McConnell has spent years obstructing progress and siding with special interests, and now he's paying for it. **Amy McGrath is the candidate to defeat Mitch -- a new poll shows she's just ONE POINT DOWN, and now even Nate Silver says she can win.**

**Amy can defeat Mitch McConnell, but she can't do it alone. That's why I'm committed to raising $25,000 today to support Amy and take back the Senate.**

Mitch McConnell has done remarkable damage to our democracy and the way that Congress functions. He's turned the Senate into a place where good ideas go to die. And he'll prioritize corporate special interests over the American people every day -- all so he can stay in power.

Amy McGrath is a strong and principled challenger to take on Mitch and the special interests that are backing him. But to win, it's going to take your support, friend.

**[Can you donate $25 or more to help me raise $25,000 to elect Amy McGrath and defeat Mitch McConnell?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-mcgrath-email?refcode=em191023mcgrath-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

**His obstruction and hypocrisy are piling up. If we take action now and support Amy McGrath, we can defeat him once and for all.**

**[To do that -- we need to raise $25,000 in the next 24 hours. Make a contribution today, and help us put the power back in the hands of the American people and out of Mitch McConnell's.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-mcgrath-email?refcode=em191023mcgrath-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Tina Smith

| | Hi Peter, Governor Ron DeSantis and the Florida GOP have been trying to strip away voting rights and disenfranchise millions. After voters approved a state-wide ballot measure restoring voting rights to former felons, they passed an unconstitutional poll tax that requires former felons to pay back all court fees and fines before they're eligible to register. That's 1.5 million people who have had their constitutional right to vote taken away. This is an immense, illegal burden for those who simply want to have their voices heard, and a judge just issued a ruling saying the state could not do that. Increasing voter turnout is going to be critical to ensuring Democrats maintain the House majority and retake the White House and Senate \-- which is exactly why Republicans are going to do everything they can to suppress voters. Because of its 29 electoral votes, Florida is critically important to Trump. 1.5 million voters could easily sway the balance, so we're surveying engaged Democrats to help plan our strategy for taking back the White House. We need 68 more responses by MIDNIGHT: **Do you support expanding voting rights?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddac/6e9863e8/15a2f323/1db08cce/199219172/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/RsDfIacB") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddac/6e9863e8/15a2f323/1db08cce/199219172/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/RsDfIacB") Thanks for your support. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddac/6e9863e8/15a2f323/1db08ccc/199219172/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191023a.ND-b&refcode2=mjXZfxLFpudfh2o50Dr4")

| Friend — Last week I called Hillary Clinton the “Queen of Warmongers.” **I’m asking for a moment of your time so I can expand on what I meant by that** — and how it’s at the center of my campaign to end costly regime change wars and overhaul my party’s failed foreign policy. This is why we are the target of a coordinated attack by the establishment elite and their friends in the corporate media: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11145858/113119397/-1420463418?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzllZjlkNC1kOWY1LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ieFs7QJH8rQ85IqgXarEPWSAd1U2kP_DIgiOkpfiV2g=&emci=a18c0a54-d8f5-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=139ef9d4-d9f5-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=661311&contactdata=hdOju49hIaLDhub78zB8T6mFSLR4%2FLcblyJCd3HdeCCA0MkHgRJ7XwuP3EV4jyX%2Frg%2BPBYJdqtK4bCyeNQO3aQTl2M5J%2BWEJb097bxKSfJA%3D&ms=em191023&refcode=em191021-video&refcode2=139ef9d4-d9f5-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68) It is long past time for the Clinton war machine, and its backers, to step aside and allow the Democratic Party to lead with a new foreign policy that is truly of, by and for the people - that upholds our values and principles, reduces nuclear tensions, strengthens our national security, honors the sacrifice of our servicemen and women and keeps trillions of taxpayer dollars from being poured into wasteful, counterproductive regime change wars, the new Cold War and nuclear arms race. **[Are you with me on this? Watch the video and then take the survey to have your say.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11145859/113119398/-1420463418?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzllZjlkNC1kOWY1LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ieFs7QJH8rQ85IqgXarEPWSAd1U2kP_DIgiOkpfiV2g=&emci=a18c0a54-d8f5-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=139ef9d4-d9f5-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=661311&contactdata=hdOju49hIaLDhub78zB8T6mFSLR4%2FLcblyJCd3HdeCCA0MkHgRJ7XwuP3EV4jyX%2Frg%2BPBYJdqtK4bCyeNQO3aQTl2M5J%2BWEJb097bxKSfJA%3D&ms=em191023&refcode=em191021-video&refcode2=139ef9d4-d9f5-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68)** Tulsi [View this message in your browser to share](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11145860/113119399/1178380278?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzllZjlkNC1kOWY1LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ieFs7QJH8rQ85IqgXarEPWSAd1U2kP_DIgiOkpfiV2g=&emci=a18c0a54-d8f5-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=139ef9d4-d9f5-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&sourceid=1014165&ms=em191023&utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em191023)

$26.

That's how much our average donation was last quarter, and that's how we're funding this campaign.

Each $3, $5, $10, and $26 donation at a time, people from all over this country have dug deep to chip in whatever they can to fund this movement because they believe in big, structural change.

Those numbers may feel small. But when hundreds of thousands of people pitch in what they can, we can build a movement that fights back against billionaires and corporate interests who've had too much influence for too long.

[**Are you ready to be a part of that? Chip in for the first time and help build a movement that will put political and economic power back in the hands of the people.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285282c9/45c30650/1024bf113/66f3eb17/2318700512/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW9jdDE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNSzk2Rl9FR1JfQVZHX0NfMjAxOTEwMjNfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-oct19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK96F_EGR_AVG_C_20191023_V1S2_P") | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

The only way to fight corporate interests and advance an agenda that puts power in the hands of working people is to run a grassroots-funded campaign -- and your support makes it possible for Elizabeth to keep talking to people across this country about the issues that matter to them.

# South Padre Island Conference
---
Come Join Latinos for Trump at our 2nd Conference of the YEAR! We will be having training and speakers on Human Trafficking from Homeland Security, Border Patrol, and law enforcement agencies, delegate training, political violence forum, 2nd Amendment forum, and Texas elected officials will be giving us updates on Texas. Come meet Gene Ho author of Trumpography personal photographer to President Trump in 2016, Joey Gibson The Patriot Prayer, and many more. Get your rap lyrics together and join us in contributing to the #MAGACHALLENGE twitter sensation Bryson Gray!

body:

Friend,
First, _Cook Political Report_ called our race a "toss-up."
Then, our campaign outraised Susan Collins last quarter without taking even a dime from corporate PACs.
**Now, for the first time, a poll shows Democrats beating Susan Collins!**
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cb1/4bef7a87/6b2fda65/287fddce/3582752261/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjMtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191023-full")

#
**With BOTH of our U.S. Senate seats on the ballot in 2020, the Senate majority will be decided in Georgia in 2020.**

And the choice couldn’t be clearer. [**Watch our new video to see what this is all about.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=8364868719&e=02cd889ad3)

| David has worked to deliver results and successfully change the direction of our country. Our agenda is working! Today we are seeing the greatest economic turnaround in modern history.

On the other hand, radical Democrats are determined to undo our results and take America down the road to socialism. We can’t let that happen!

Simply put, this is about the future of our Republic. David is ready for the fight, but we can’t do this without YOU. It’s up to each of us to tell this story.

[**Watch our new video and share it with your family and friends!**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=fad1be2437&e=02cd889ad3)

Thank you for everything.

Team Perdue

body:

| | **If you 've been waiting for the right time to volunteer with Team Julian -- the time is now. ** Our campaign needs to raise $800,000 by October 31st to stay in the race, and the good news is that we're on pace! **However, we 're going to need to keep up our outreach to thousands of past donors and prospective donors to thank them for their support and ask them to pitch in again. ** You can help from home -- make phone calls or send texts with Team Julian remotely. [**I CAN MAKE CALLS!**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfb0/3eb3e2fc/549789f7/744dd415/4181630093/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://bit.ly/PhoneBankFromHome?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+I+CAN+MAKE+CALLS&utm_campaign=20191023_em_vol&source=20191023_em_vol") [**I CAN SEND TEXTS!**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfb0/3eb3e2fc/549789f7/744dd414/4181630093/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://bit.ly/OnlineTextTeam?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+I+CAN+SEND+TEXTS&utm_campaign=20191023_em_vol&source=20191023_em_vol") Once you sign up, we'll send you everything you need to join our virtual field office and get started. We use digital platforms to facilitate the supporter to supporter outreach, and you don't need to use your own number. We hope we can count on you to help us reach our goal! Sign up today to [make calls](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfb0/3eb3e2fc/549789f7/744dd413/4181630093/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://bit.ly/PhoneBankFromHome?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4+-+make+calls&utm_campaign=20191023_em_vol&source=20191023_em_vol") or [send texts](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfb0/3eb3e2fc/549789f7/744dd412/4181630093/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://bit.ly/OnlineTextTeam?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5+-+send+texts&utm_campaign=20191023_em_vol&source=20191023_em_vol") with us. Lillie [**DONATE**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfb0/3eb3e2fc/549789f7/744dd411/4181630093/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://bit.ly/Castro800?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191023_em_vol&source=20191023_em_vol")

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfb0/3eb3e2fc/549789f7/744dd41d/4181630093/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=10+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191023_em_vol&source=20191023_em_vol")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfb0/3eb3e2fc/549789f7/744dd41c/4181630093/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=20191023_em_vol&source=20191023_em_vol"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfb0/3eb3e2fc/549789f7/744dd41b/4181630093/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191023_em_vol&source=20191023_em_vol"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Greg Stanton
subject: this deserves a vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
**I am proud that the very first bill introduced in Congress this term was a comprehensive bill to reform our democracy, root out corruption, and secure our elections. **

H.R. 1, otherwise known as the _For The People Act_ , was passed by all of my Democratic colleagues in the House over seven months ago, and yet Mitch McConnell still has not held a single vote on it in the Senate.

[**Add your name to tell Mitch McConnell to let the Senate vote on H.R. 1 -- _SIGN ON »_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/vaTeTlIDCNRO-k_xBVICAMwSnXnpkcIrkbAPkEFN1eY=/efxa6y3k0-2buuOM5fAUGXytxA0UGL_9ZlEYeVqOfTk=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/vaTeTlIDCNRO-k_xBVICAMwSnXnpkcIrkbAPkEFN1eY=/efxa6y3k0-2buuOM5fAUGXytxA0UGL_9ZlEYeVqOfTk=)

According to an April poll by _Real Clear Politics,_ "53% of voters believe that political corruption is a crisis, while another 36% called political corruption a significant problem."

**There is just no excuse for the Senate to have not taken any action yet on this urgent crisis. **

[**Will you join me in calling on the Senate to vote on H.R. 1?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/vaTeTlIDCNRO-k_xBVICAMwSnXnpkcIrkbAPkEFN1eY=/efxa6y3k0-2buuOM5fAUGXytxA0UGL_9ZlEYeVqOfTk=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/vaTeTlIDCNRO-k_xBVICAMwSnXnpkcIrkbAPkEFN1eY=/efxa6y3k0-2buuOM5fAUGXytxA0UGL_9ZlEYeVqOfTk=)

Thank you for taking action,

\-- _ Greg_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---
Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/vaTeTlIDCNRO-k_xBVICAMwSnXnpkcIrkbAPkEFN1eY=/XlV_mu4Om97NR5G4Fi6xC0aDmBsBChE_rKfkcCPIpZ0=).

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: We need Congress to increase funding to Pre-K programs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Supporting public education is critical to supporting the growth of our children \-- early education has been shown to have a cascade effect of better performance in school and career outcomes. Despite this, one in three U.S. children still enter kindergarten without any formal preschooling. And only 29 percent of four-year-olds are enrolled in state-funded preschooling, intensifying the economic burdens that exist today for parents who want a good education for their child. [**If you support public education and helping build a better future for our children, please add your name to this petition -- urge Congress to expand funding for early education and Pre-K education so that all children have a brighter future.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddad/6e9863e8/15dc0df3/1db08f30/3072464920/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/prek-funding/wdtop/") Thank you, The WDTO Team [SIGN THE PETITION](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddad/6e9863e8/15dc0df3/1db08f30/3072464920/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/prek-funding/wdtop/")

name: Corky Messner
subject: Did you hear what they said?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Did you watch the debate last week? These people are utterly insane. In less than an hour they talked about nullifying the election, raising middle class taxes, and putting DC bureaucrats in charge of your healthcare.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/130dfc30a28ec712/575facd89565e04fc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, Did you watch the debate last week?
These people are utterly insane. In less than an hour they talked about nullifying the election, raising middle class taxes, and putting DC bureaucrats in charge of your healthcare.
These people don’t have a lick of common sense between them. In fact, one of them wants to take your tax dollars and pay people NOT to work.
That’s right he literally wants to give people money for being lazy.
Another one, wants to confiscate your guns.
And they all oppose President Trump’s common-sense solutions, like getting our border under control and building a wall on the southern border.
I’m running for Senate because, I know we need to build the wall, I know that your healthcare should be left between you and your doctor, and I know that your taxes are already too high.
And that’s why I’m asking you to help me stop their radical agenda.
**[Peter, will you make sure the only way to get a pay check in America by working for it? If so, I need you to donate $20.20 to stop their insane 2020 agenda today](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/130dfc30a28ec712/ec24c1c516c0d00fc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
In 2020, the US Presidential could come down to a decision on New Hampshire.
In 2016, New Hampshire’s 4 electoral votes were decided by just a few thousand votes. And, that’s not the first time the margin was small. It’s been close in three out of the last four presidential election.
If we’re going to make sure last week’s nightmare doesn’t become reality, we we MUST turn New Hampshire Red in 2020.
And to do that, I’m counting on your support. **Peter, in 2016, New Hampshire was decided by fewer than 3k votes.** **[<<<<Donate $15 to Turn New Hampshire Red>>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/130dfc30a28ec712/8a4dd1f9f6dc022ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)** **[< <<<Donate $35 to Turn New Hampshire Red>>>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/130dfc30a28ec712/ebfbbd088dc430ebc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** **[< <<<Donate $50 to Turn New Hampshire Red>>>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/130dfc30a28ec712/c77865804b802b59c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** **[< <<<Donate $100 to Turn New Hampshire Red>>>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/130dfc30a28ec712/9ba84a46acc1fae4c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** I served as an Army Ranger during the Cold War under Ronald Reagan. But last night’s debate was terrifying, and it showed me that next year will be the most important election in my life time.
With your support, we can win it.
For America,
Corky Messner | |
---

It’s been close in three out of the last four presidential election. If we’re going to make sure last week’s nightmare doesn’t become reality, we we MUST turn New Hampshire Red in 2020. And to do that, I’m counting on your support. Peter, in 2016, New Hampshire was decided by fewer than 3k votes. I served as an Army Ranger during the Cold War under Ronald Reagan. But last night’s debate was terrifying, and it showed me that next year will be the most important election in my life time. With your support, we can win it. For America, Corky Messner | | PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE |
