name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: You made this happen
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

It’s hard to express how grateful I am to see how many of you stepped up
in the past week to help get me on the debate stage next month.

Earlier today, I found out that we received one more qualifying poll ––
putting us one giant leap closer to meeting the requirements for the
debate.

You made this happen.
I’ve never been more confident that with your help we can get this
done. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39626?refcode=ema20191023-63136&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=63136%2E444211%2EOPNG1y ]Will you chip in $3 or anything you can to help
us beat the November 13 deadline to qualify for the next debate?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39626?refcode=ema20191023-63136&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=63136%2E444211%2EOPNG1y ]Contribute $3

This campaign has always been about defying the odds.

We didn’t decide to run because my platform got a stamp of approval from
people in Washington or because we had a consultant-approved plan to
cruise through the election.

We started this campaign because there are people who have been waiting
for a very long time for a leader who will fearlessly fight for them.
There’s a lack of courage in our politics and people are paying a serious
price for it.

Our children are practicing lock-down drills before they learn
multiplication, folks who have lived in the United States for decades wake
up fearful everyday that ICE will send them to a country they don’t call
home, and families are begging strangers online to help pay for their
medical bills because their insurance refuses to cover their health care.

Every time I get on the debate stage, I bring these stories –– and the
thousands of other stories you’ve shared with me on the road –– because
this campaign has always been about fighting for you.

Thank you for helping us make sure we have the chance to do that again
next month. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39626?refcode=ema20191023-63136&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=63136%2E444211%2EOPNG1y ]We’re so close to making this happen –– please chip in
$3 or whatever you can before time runs out.

Thank you.

Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191023footer&t=1022&refcode2=63136_444211_OPNG1y&akid=63136%2E444211%2EOPNG1y

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=63136%2E444211%2EOPNG1y

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: listening to the science
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
body:
| [**_Sign here to stand with me and demand that the Senate listen to the scientists and take action to address the climate crisis._**](https://action.vanhollen.?g=PT9eB2V4ADlVXspjkuyiHMA "https://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/science?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&city=Silver Spring&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Sign+here+to+stand+with+me+and+demand+th&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EN_WL_191022_1_1&source=CVH_EM_EN_WL_191022_1_1")
* * *
Last week, my Democratic colleagues and I successfully forced a vote on overturning Trump's latest outrageous giveaway to the fossil fuel industry, the Dirty Power Plan -- and 52 Senate Republicans voted to defeat it.

**We need to keep fighting.**

Senate Majority Leader McConnell doesn't seem to understand that climate change isn't a game about scoring political points, it's a crisis that scientists say will inflict increasingly catastrophic damage on our communities, our economy, our public health, and our planet.

The science is clear, and time is running out. That's why I'm asking for your help.

[_**Add your name by clicking here if you agree that the Senate has a moral obligation to listen to scientists and take action to deal with the climate crisis!**_](https://action.vanhollen.?g=PT9eB2V4ADlVXspjkuyiHMA "https://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/science?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&city=Silver Spring&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+by+clicking+here+if+you+ag&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EN_WL_191022_1_1&source=CVH_EM_EN_WL_191022_1_1")

I support the Green New Deal which lays out an ambitious agenda to address the crisis of our time. And I have led the fight for tough legislation to require polluters to pay for their carbon emissions and return those funds back to every single household in the form of a 'carbon fee dividend'. Technology offers new solutions and possibilities every day, but we must create the legislative environment to reward creative action on carbon mitigation.

Bottomline: we can't afford to fall short on this. The stakes couldn't be higher. That's why I'm reaching out to you today.

[**_Will you help increase the pressure on my Senate Republican colleagues to listen to the scientists on this and take action to address the climate crisis? If so, click here!_**](https://action.vanhollen.?g=PT9eB2V4ADlVXspjkuyiHMA "https://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/science?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&city=Silver Spring&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Will+you+help+increase+the+pressure+on+m&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EN_WL_191022_1_1&source=CVH_EM_EN_WL_191022_1_1")

Onward,

Chris

---
Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
---

name: Murray
subject: Hello from Bowling Green!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
I'm a field organizer in Bowling Green. That means I spend my day working with volunteers, making phone calls, and knocking on doors.
|
---

| | Peter,

I'm a field organizer in Bowling Green. That means I spend my day working with volunteers, making phone calls, and knocking on doors. But this is more than a job -- it's personal because this is where I grew up. And I know what this election means for my friends and neighbors.

We have a goal of knocking on a million doors by Election Day, because when we show up and talk to people about the issues that matter to them, we win. **That 's why we have a goal of raising $15,000 to fully fund our field operation. Help us knock on that 1,000,000th door and donate today.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE To comply with state law, we must use best efforts to obtain, maintain, and submit the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals and their spouses, when personal contributions exceed $100 per election cycle. Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019. Lindy Karns, Treasurer._

name: Mike Turner
subject: Tell Schiff NO!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDA5NTM4MjAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTYyMjE1ODkxNAS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Ever since Nancy Pelosi called for an impeachment investigation into President Trump, Adam Schiff has refused to be held publicly accountable. Schiff continues to hold private briefings, having his staff meet with the whistleblowers and leakers, and refusing to allow Republicans to fully participate.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDA5NTM4MjAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjE1ODkxNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,
Ever since Nancy Pelosi called for an impeachment investigation into President Trump, Adam Schiff has refused to be held publicly accountable. Schiff continues to hold private briefings, having his staff meet with the whistleblowers and leakers, and refusing to allow Republicans to fully participate.
Schiff continues to fabricate this investigation and fails to follow due process. [_**We must hold him accountable!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDA5NTM4MjAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjE1ODkxNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
The American people deserve transparency and to know the truth! [_**That is why I am launching a petition to say NO to Schiff 's closed door investigation**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDA5NTM4MjAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjE1ODkxNAS2&mt=1&rt=0).
Each day Schiff's laundry list of lies pile up. He continues to push fake news out of the Intelligence Committee. This has to end. This backroom investigation is unprecedented in the history of our country.
Let's send Schiff a long list of Americans who want transparency! [_**Join me and your fellow Americans in telling Schiff to open the doors to this shifty investigation!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDA5NTM4MjAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjE1ODkxNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[_**Sign our petition today!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDA5NTM4MjAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMjE1ODkxNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,
Mike Turner

name: Team Warner
subject: We still need 47 more voters from Manassas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Look, the momentum may be on our side but Republicans aren't going down without a fight.
|
---
| | Derek,

Election Day in Virginia is closing in on us! If you've taken action to help Democrats take back the majority in the General Assembly -- by making a donation, knocking on doors, or even reminding your friends to vote -- thank you! **[But do _you_ have a plan to vote yet?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d033/53d9897e/52145b9c/1c893f9a/3809556767/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-pledge2votea")**
| **47 voters**
needed in
**Manassas**
to flip VA **blue**! **[**Pledge to Vote**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d033/53d9897e/52145b9c/1c893f9a/3809556767/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-pledge2votea")**
---

Look, the momentum may be on our side but Republicans aren't going down without a fight. They're defending their two-seat margin in each chamber with everything they've got. **If we 're going to flip the General Assembly blue, _every single eligible voter_ has to show up at the polls on November 5th.**

Mark has already pledged to vote. **[Will you join him by also pledging to vote right now?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d033/53d9897e/52145b9c/1c893f9a/3809556767/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-pledge2votea")**

Once you've made your pledge, ask your friends and family to do the same. Give them a call, send them a text, or just forward this email and let us do the talking!

We're so close to restoring a state legislature that will work for ALL Virginians. But it'll only happen if we all get out to the polls and do our part. **[Pledge to vote right now.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d033/53d9897e/52145b9c/1c893f9a/3809556767/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-pledge2votea")**

Thank you,
Team Warner

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d033/53d9897e/52145b9c/1c893f99/3809556767/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20191023a__291__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: BREAKING: House GOP storms impeachment inquiry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Members of the House Freedom Caucus, some of Trump's most ardent supporters, protested outside of the secure hearing room today and even gained entry, interrupting proceedings and claiming "unfair" treatment. They were able to get unsecured phones in to the hearing and tweeted from the secure room, a violation of national security. This ignores the fact that these hearings have been before bipartisan committees and conducted behind closed doors to protect testimony and ensure accuracy. When Republicans realized what they'd done, they tried to cover themselves by saying the tweets were from staff, but their hypocrisy and idiocy was on full display. The GOP isn't interested in a fair hearing \-- they know that can't possibly help Trump. They want a speedy end to this so they don't have to continually defend his illegal, immoral, and unethical actions. The wave of support for Trump's impeachment and removal from office is building, but we want to hear from you on this subject so we can have the clearest understanding of where the average Democratic voter stands: **Should Democrats protect the House impeachment investigation?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddaf/6e9863e8/15d9fb74/1db08fb9/4252743517/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/C8GaP9fu") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddaf/6e9863e8/15d9fb74/1db08fb9/4252743517/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/C8GaP9fu") Thank you for answering our question, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddaf/6e9863e8/15d9fb74/1db08fb8/4252743517/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191023c.ND-b&refcode2=017bq54ZfgOA7vHmpRpE")

They were able to get unsecured phones in to the hearing and tweeted from the secure room, a violation of national security. This ignores the fact that these hearings have been before bipartisan committees and conducted behind closed doors to protect testimony and ensure accuracy. When Republicans realized what they'd done, they tried to cover themselves by saying the tweets were from staff, but their hypocrisy and idiocy was on full display. The GOP isn't interested in a fair hearing \-- they know that can't possibly help Trump. They want a speedy end to this so they don't have to continually defend his illegal, immoral, and unethical actions. The wave of support for Trump's impeachment and removal from office is building, but we want to hear from you on this subject so we can have the clearest understanding of where the average Democratic voter stands: Should Democrats protect the House impeachment investigation? "" "" Thank you for answering our question, WDTO Team "" | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC PO Box 15320 Washington, DC 20003 ""

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: NEW TODAY: President Trump secures permanent ceasefire in northeast Syria
body:
In a major address today, President Donald J. Trump said that Turkey has agreed to turn their recent ceasefire along the Syrian border into a... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dc7b0c9cab&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 23, 2019
---
| | |
# **NEW TODAY: President Trump secures permanent ceasefire in northeast Syria**

**In a major address today,** President Donald J. Trump said that Turkey has agreed to turn their recent ceasefire along the Syrian border into a permanent agreement. As a result, the U.S. Treasury has lifted all of its recently imposed sanctions on Turkey.

**President Trump:**[8 years after failed regime change, it’s time to come home.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cfad428f76&e=3ee4985eea)

**The agreement achieved** by the Trump Administration, including the original 5-day ceasefire negotiated last week, has helped save lives and allow the Kurds to safely leave affected areas. These actions will help secure a more peaceful and stable border between Turkey and Syria. Ultimately, however, responsibility rests with those countries.

**“How many Americans** must die in the Middle East in the midst of these ancient sectarian and tribal conflicts?” President Trump asked. “After all of the precious blood and treasure America has poured into the deserts of the Middle East, I am committed to pursuing a different course—one that leads to victory for America.”

**The United States** expects Turkey to honor its commitments in the efforts to counter ISIS. We have defeated the Islamic State caliphate, and now it’s time for others in the region to step up and ensure ISIS does not regain territory.

**“Should Turkey fail** to honor its obligations—including the protection of religious and ethnic minorities—we reserve the right to re-impose crippling sanctions, including substantially increased tariffs on steel and all other products coming out of Turkey,” President Trump said.

**Tough diplomacy,** backed by American economic power and strength, saves lives. It also avoids the worst instincts of the Washington foreign policy establishment. “We have avoided another costly military intervention that could've led to disastrous, far-reaching consequences. Many thousands of people could've been killed,” the President said.

**Bottom line: President Trump** will not send tens of thousands of American troops into never-ending conflict in Syria. He is not going to continue the disastrous policies of the previous Administration in the Middle East. And, most important, he is not going to get America into another endless war that costs us countless lives and resources.

**🎬** [President Trump: 30 days turned into 10 years of war.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0e5e6a8dce&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **First Lady Melania Trump visits Capitol Hill**

**This morning,** First Lady Melania Trump made her first solo visit to the U.S. Capitol, marking the one year anniversary of the SUPPORT Act, which promotes opioid recovery.

**While there** , she thanked the legislators who helped make the law into a reality.

**Watch:** [First Lady encourages kids to stay drug free](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=adcefab25e&e=3ee4985eea)

**“A year ago,** you passed and our Administration signed into law the SUPPORT for Patients and Communities Act . . . Neonatal Abstinence Syndrome, or NAS, is an area I have focused on, and this Act provides support to mothers and their infants born with NAS,” Mrs. Trump said.

**“I have traveled** to some of the areas hardest hit by drug abuse, and I have seen the devastating effects that this crisis has on families and children. This is why the SUPPORT Act is so important. It provides the necessary tools to fight this crisis.”

**With National Drug Take Back** **Day** coming this Saturday, the First Lady also highlighted the importance of safely discarding leftover prescription opioids that can be found in our homes. Left in place, these unused drugs often find their way into our children’s hands.

[“Melania Trump receives warm welcome on first solo Capitol Hill visit.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e630bea284&e=3ee4985eea)

**More** : [Learn about the First Lady’s ‘Be Best’ initiative for child well-being.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2636d0a816&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
| **President Trump talks to members of the press on the South Lawn prior to boarding Marine One** | October 23, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=084e654cc5&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8ab01b7b77&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=8a5e654917)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Laura Loomer: Disruptor for Congress
body:
This morning, I woke up to read a column that Michelle Malkin was kind enough to write about my run for Congress.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-351418-816821-4690855-3dd7cb553f-49851b41a1)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-351418-816821-4690855-3dd7cb553f-49851b41a1) This morning, I woke up to read a column that Michelle Malkin was kind enough to write about my run for Congress.

Regarding my campaign outraising the Democrat incumbent that I'm running against, Michelle had this to say:
> Any way you slice it, this is news. It's especially noteworthy because Loomer is the most banned woman on all of social media.

**Not many people notice that**.

In an age dominated by Facebook and Twitter, most campaigns would be unable to effectively exist outside of social media.

Think about that.

Would AOC be in Congress today without Twitter?

Doubt it.

Even President Trump would have to work twice as hard to cut through the bias of the Fake News media if Twitter shut down his account.

In our digital world, social media dominates the attention of most Americans -- **and it's controlled by the RADICAL LEFT**.

While they're making my job much more difficult by banning me, we're going to show them how it's done!

[If you can, make a donation now and send them a message](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-351418-816821-4690855-3dd7cb553f-49851b41a1).

Another paragraph that I appreciated in Malkin's piece was this:
> Loomer's campaign is about far more than getting back a Twitter account. It's about giving Floridians (and the rest of us) a clarion voice against Beltway business as usual on everything from mass, uncontrolled immigration to antifa violence to political corruption enabled by [radical Democrat incumbent] Frankel's pal, Nancy Pelosi.

When I first announced my candidacy, liberal reporters said it was a "stunt" to get back on social media.

Now that I'm "verified" as a legitimate candidate after outraising the incumbent, **the word is that Democrats are huddling on a daily basis trying to figure out how to beat me.**

I expect the hit pieces will start to pour in, as the Fake News media frantically search for something that will dissuade YOU from supporting my run.

[But stand fast with me](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-351418-816821-4690855-3dd7cb553f-49851b41a1), and you can hold me to this promise:

**>From my first day in office to my last in representing the people of Florida's 21st District, I will keep exposing radical Democrats for who they are.**
I will not tolerate their lies.

I will not tolerate their dereliction of duty for political gain.

And I sure as hell won't tolerate the hate and stupidity of "the Squad" or as Malkin called them, the "Congressional Brat Pack."

Here's what Michelle Malkin said in her closing paragraph:
> They keep throwing up obstacles, but the gonzo journalist/activist persists. She's made all the right enemies. Now, it's time for friends of the First Amendment to put their time and money where their mouths are. Help elect a one-woman Free Speech Squad to counter the anti-American congressional Brat Pack. Disruption, not deference, is the key to defeating the Democratic resistance.

Please follow Mrs. Malkin's lead--and help me close out October strong -- [by supporting my campaign today](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-351418-816821-4690855-3dd7cb553f-49851b41a1).

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. I can't tell you how many people told me how "hard" running for office would be without the benefit of social media. It hasn't been easy so far, but we're doing it and we shocked them with our financial report from last quarter. [**Help me do it again by donating here**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-351418-816821-4690855-3dd7cb553f-49851b41a1).

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-351418-816821-4690855-3dd7cb553f-49851b41a1)
Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-351418-816821-84585d41bbe610b-49851b41a1)

[**Can you chip in $20 or $50 today to help us boost our ads?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGLpoUF73XbcAaBnKmo5G5HM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191023_fr_s&n=8)

Bill

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: An easy way to help
body:
Want to help Indiana Republican mayoral candidates, but don't know how? It's not too late to make a difference in the upcoming mayoral elections...... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/an-easy-way-to-help?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ebc0ca0104&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republican -

Want to help our Indiana Republican mayoral candidates, but don't know how? Here’s your answer:

**You're invited to join us at the Indiana GOP headquarters in downtown Indy, where we’ll be dialing up Hoosiers in cities throughout Indiana, making sure they get out and VOTE in this year’s critical municipal races. And we need your help making calls.**
[\--> RSVP Here: Food, Friends, and Phone Banking! <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2f1c33b9fb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
We're now less than two weeks away from Election Day -- but it's not too late to make a big difference in an easy and fun way.
**Indiana GOP Phone Banks
_Indiana GOP HQ – Downtown Indianapolis_**

**Thursday, Oct. 31: 5 p.m. – 9 p.m.
Friday, Nov. 1: 5 p.m. – 9 p.m.
Saturday, Nov. 2: 9 a.m. – 9 p.m.
Sunday, Nov. 3: 12 p.m. – 8 p.m.
Monday, Nov. 4: 9 a.m. – 9 p.m.
Tuesday, Nov. 5: 9 p.m. – 5:45 p.m.**
This phone bank will be well-stocked each day with food and the tools you’ll need to make a difference. So grab your friends, and spend a few hours making phone calls and helping make sure your fellow Republicans get out and vote.

**It’s all about results for Hoosiers – and you can help make it happen by volunteering for our phone banks in the final drive before Election Day.[Will you be there? RSVP now!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=514ea11564&e=1acd9bb3d6)**

name: Team Stephanie
subject: Policy matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
Every bill, every vote matters. And we deserve someone in Washington who'll work for us.
|
---

| | Friends \-- [In just a moment, we're going to ask you to chip in to support Stephanie's campaign](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b9/522d4087/7afdb6c9/4f342676/2026112904/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191023_em_btest&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=1+-+In+just+a+moment+wersquore+going+to+ask+&utm_campaign=20191023_em&source=20191023_em"), but first we want to tell you about a few numbers that mean a lot to working families in New Jersey:
### ✅ **303,900**
### ✅ **470,874**
### ✅ **42%**
Thanks to the Affordable Care Act (and no thanks to Chris Smith who's voted against it), **303,900** people with pre-existing conditions in New Jersey's 4th district can't be discriminated against or pay higher premiums for their pre-existing condition. And thanks to the Medicaid and CHIP expansion under the Affordable Care Act, **470,874** more New Jerseyans--children and those most vulnerable--have access to healthcare through those programs. That's a **42%** reduction in the uninsured rate from 2013 to 2017 just in the state of New Jersey. But if Republicans regain control of the House in 2020, they've already signaled they will continue their completely ridiculous attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act. **Stephanie will go to Congress to protect and expand access to healthcare, unlike her opponent who 's voted repeatedly to repeal the ACA.** [**Can you chip in to help send Stephanie to Washington in 2020?**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b9/522d4087/7afdb6c9/4f342675/2026112904/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191023_em_btest&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+chip+in+to+help+send+Stephanie+t&utm_campaign=20191023_em&source=20191023_em") Policy matters. Who we send to Washington to write, vote, and negotiate that policy matters. Throughout Stephanie's career in the State Department and the Center for Reproductive Rights, she's seen just how much of an impact policy passed by legislators in Washington has at home and abroad. Stephanie is the leader this district needs to be a part of writing the policies that improve the lives of working families and make it easier to thrive. **[If you can, chip in now to send a leader who will fight for us with every policy and every vote when she's in the House.](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b9/522d4087/7afdb6c9/4f342674/2026112904/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191023_em_btest&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=3+-+If+you+can+chip+in+now+to+send+a+leader+&utm_campaign=20191023_em&source=20191023_em")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[Donate $10](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b9/522d4087/7afdb6c9/4f342673/2026112904/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20191023_em_btest_abx_10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=4+-+Donate+10&utm_campaign=20191023_em&source=20191023_em")**
---
**[Donate $25](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b9/522d4087/7afdb6c9/4f342672/2026112904/VEsD/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20191023_em_btest_abx_25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=5+-+Donate+25&utm_campaign=20191023_em&source=20191023_em")**
---
**[Donate $35](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b9/522d4087/7afdb6c9/4f342671/2026112904/VEsA/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=20191023_em_btest_abx_35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=6+-+Donate+35&utm_campaign=20191023_em&source=20191023_em")**
---
**[Donate other amount](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b9/522d4087/7afdb6c9/4f342670/2026112904/VEsB/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191023_em_btest_abx_other&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=7+-+Donate+other+amount&utm_campaign=20191023_em&source=20191023_em")**
---
\-- Team Stephanie
|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: What Lindsey Graham said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
We hear some Republicans in Washington say nasty things all the time. That's the sad reality we live in right now. But something happened yesterday that I can't get over so easily. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771485/691c9bd/6fdfc159/11a795e6/1117328446/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-harrison?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

We hear some Republicans in Washington say nasty things all the time. That's the sad reality we live in right now. But something happened yesterday that I can't get over so easily.

**Lindsey Graham --a United States Senator from South Carolina--described Trump's impeachment inquiry in Congress as "a lynching in every sense."**

Words matter. Lindsey Graham should know why he's wrong to invoke such a painful and awful part of our history. He should know what that word means to so many Americans. His state saw the horrors of lynching up close, as did we in Colorado.

He should know all of that. And he said it anyway to defend Donald Trump.

**Lindsey Graham deserves to lose his job for a lot of reasons, but this comment in particular makes me want to stand up and help the person who will defeat him.**

Jaime Harrison is within striking distance of Graham in the latest polling, and he's already closing the fundraising gap. He can win, and we can help.

[**_If you want to help Jaime Harrison defeat Lindsey Graham, split a donation with his campaign today._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-harrison?refcode=em_fr_20191023_JH_20191023-fr-JH-grahamharrison-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,

John
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-harrison?refcode=em_fr_20191023_JH_20191023-fr-JH-grahamharrison-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
